rulings.Case Title: CHARLES EDWARD BOYLE et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Defendant Certainteed Corporation'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, January 8, 2007, Line 13. DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED REGARDING STRICT LIABILITY FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. THE OBJECTION TO BLAKENGER'S DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION REGARDING PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED. THE OBJECTION TO CASTLEMAN DECLARATION IS DENIED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION REGARDING FALSE REPRESENTATION ENTERPRISE LIABILITY IS GRANTED. =302/PJM/AP
